key_qualifications: Ability to lead a project team, Excellent organizational and managerial skills, Good communication and interpersonal skills, Enthusiastic, positive with ability to take decisive steps at critical moments, Experience in working with different teams, Ability to work under stress and multi tasking scenario, Quick learner and can adopt to organization culture quickly, Ability to plan, execute and control an Telecom projects and interfacing with Railway/ DMRC/JMRC/GMRCL technical officials and other contractors, Ability to complete a project in a tight budget and scheduled time, Result- oriented with the ability to coordinate multiples projects and teams simultaneously, To make all necessary arrangements like procurement etc. and coordinate with contractors teams to complete the work in scheduled time, Ability to look after the quality of work to satisfy technical contractual requirements

employment_record.previous_position_held: Consultant-Telecom for Business Development in Telecom field
employment_record.title_of_position_held: Consultant-Telecom for Business Development in Telecom field
activities_performed: Responsible for expand the business and innovate new technologies to implement in Telecom domain.
To do the interfacing with officials for getting new Telecom Projects in Metro and Railways.
Responsible for making strategic partnership with reputed organizations.

Responsible for planning, monitoring and controlling the installation and commissioning activities of the telecom systems like Passenger Information Display System (PIDS), Public Address System (PAS), Master Clocks System, Radio, CCTV, FOTS, Telephone System and S&T UPS System.
Responsible for monitoring and controlling the installation and commissioning teams including subcontractor’s teams.
Sending progress reports and site constraints to the Customer & Internal Top Management and raising issues with solutions to the customer.
Responsible for testing (PAT, SAT & ITC) and commissioning of Telecom systems along with DMRC/JMRC officials.

Responsible for interfacing with DMRC/JMRC officers and other system contractors like Detailed Design Consultants (Architect), Civil Contractors, E&M Contractors, Traction, ECS, SCADA contractors and Signalling contractors to solve site related issues.
Responsible for planning, monitoring and controlling the installation and commissioning activities of the Telecom system (CCTV).
Responsible for planning, implementation, Monitoring and Controlling the Metro/Railway Telecom projects.
To do the liaison with Govt./ Railway technical officers and staff.

Completed successfully Projects in Railway Telecommunication works including Trenching, Cable Laying of Telecom/power/ OFC cables, Erection of apparatus cases/junction boxes, Panel/Route Relay Interlocking (our RRI system with more than 50 routes is working successfully in Ghaziabad Railway Station for Yard), Installation of Point Machines, Data Loggers, Axel Counters(SSDAC & MSDAC), Level Crossing Gates and Train Protection & Warning System (Ansaldo STS) in Delhi-Agra section etc.
Responsible for supervising site Telecom project works and monitor sub- contractor’s teams.
To do the liaison with Indian Railway technical officers and staff.
Responsible for Installation, commissioning & maintenance work of Railway Telecom equipment like Telephones-Exchange System etc.
Responsible for sales and servicing of equipment like Data Retrieve Systems & Finger Print Matching System of Australian & U.K. companies.
